case_title: VICTOR SELLA-VILLA VS. TAQUERIAS LA ALTENA INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLA-VILLA, VICTOR SERVED SEP-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TAQUERIAS LA ALTENA INC.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-16-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-29-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. FEB-10-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF APR-27-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLA-VILLA, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT TAQUERIAS LA ALTENA INC. DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-10-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-26-2012
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JAMES DUNCAN MORRISON.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-29-2012 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JAMES DUNCAN MORRISON.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE APR-26-2012.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TAQUERIAS LA ALTENA INC.
ARBITRATOR THOMAS MICHAEL FRIEDER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-27-2012 THROUGH JUL-26-2012.
